allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "Search system PATH \(system-level, not session-level\):"; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) -split ";" | Select-String -Pattern "miktex|tex" -CaseSensitive:$false; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Search user PATH:"; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\) -split ";" | Select-String -Pattern "miktex|tex" -CaseSensitive:$false)

PowerShell($env:Path += ";F:\\MiKTeX\\miktex\\bin\\x64"; pdflatex --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Testing compile of abstract_intro_v0_1.tex..."; Set-Location "F:\\paper3_wave_elevator\\paper_draft"; pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error abstract_intro_v0_1.tex 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell($env:Path += ";F:\\MiKTeX\\miktex\\bin\\x64"; Write-Output "=== Step 1a: Setting auto-install packages ==="; initexmf --admin --set-config-value=[MPM]AutoInstall=1 2>&1; initexmf --set-config-value=[MPM]AutoInstall=1 2>&1; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Step 1b: Switching to Tsinghua mirror ==="; mpm --admin --set-repository=https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CTAN/ 2>&1; mpm --set-repository=https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CTAN/ 2>&1; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Step 1c: Verify settings ==="; initexmf --show-config-value=[MPM]AutoInstall 2>&1; mpm --list-repositories 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "tuna|tsinghua" -CaseSensitive:$false)
